title: Sanity-Check Totals Immediately After Upload
summary: One aggregate check against a known control number saves hours of downstream debugging.

content.summary: One aggregate check against a known control number saves hours of downstream debugging.

body.text: If total revenue is off by 10x, every chart and AI answer built on it is wrong. Sum primary amount column after standard filters. Compare to finance flash or prior week within expected variance. Investigate row count and type issues before building narratives.

body.alt: Business planning with documents and laptop
body.caption: Business planning with documents and laptop. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Sum primary amount column after standard filters. Compare to finance flash or prior week within expected variance.
Investigate row count and type issues before building narratives.

items: Confirm currency column—not quantity—feeds revenue sums.
Check for duplicated rows inflating totals.
Verify date filter includes intended close window.

body.text: Teams that sanity-check first rarely ship wrong board numbers.
Document variance thresholds that trigger escalation.
Datilio makes post-upload sums and filtered totals fast to compute and compare.

meta_description: One aggregate check against a known control number saves hours of downstream debugging.
